note: Sunday — last trading session was Friday 2026-04-17. Markets reopen Monday 2026-04-20.
geopolitical_context: Middle East conflict active. Strait of Hormuz intermittently disrupted since March 2026. US-Iran negotiations ongoing. WTI oscillated between $79 and $98 in 3 days.

EURUSD.note: Struggling below 1.1800 resistance. Cautious mood around Iran talks.

GBPUSD.note: Declining toward 1.3500 support. Short-term bearish despite BOE hike bets underpinning medium-term.

USDJPY.note: Holding support at 158.00 despite broad USD weakness. JPY not behaving as safe-haven vs USD.

XAUUSD.note: Geopolitical premium sustained. Central bank buying. JPMorgan/Goldman range $4000-$6300 for 2026.

SP500.note: New all-time high on 17/04. Conditional on Hormuz de-escalation. VIX at 17.94.

WTI.note: Extreme volatility. Hormuz open/close cycles create +/-20% swings. Avoid trading.

risk_indicators.VIX_interpretation: Moderate — below 25 threshold. Risk-on posture maintained.
